name: io.github.ChanMeng666/vitex
description: Career as Code — generate tailored, ATS-optimized resume PDFs and cover letters from a job description over MCP. Same 9 tools via a local stdio server (vitex-cli) or the hosted OAuth-protected remote endpoint.
title: Vitex — AI Resume Generator

environmentVariables.name: VITEX_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: A Vitex API key (vitex_<prefix>_<secret>). Mint one at https://www.vitex.org.nz/dashboard.
